name: aolined-personal-scenes
description: A scene-based personal homepage with a live AI discussion feed.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/server.mjs && node --check scripts/server-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/ai-hot.mjs && node --check scripts/music-status.mjs && node --check src/app.js
scripts.test: node scripts/verify.mjs && node --test scripts/ai-hot.test.mjs scripts/github-hot.test.mjs scripts/weibo-hot.test.mjs scripts/music-status.test.mjs scripts/release-contract.test.mjs scripts/server-path.test.mjs scripts/server.test.mjs scripts/ui-contract.test.mjs
